raw_consumer_statement: I had made a purchase with my Citi Double Cash card at XXXX 's on XX/XX/XXXX for {$34.00}. I had purchased XXXX sandwiches ( Club Melt ). My partner and I became ill. I've attempted to resolve it via the merchant with no result. I've attempted to file a dispute with Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX and they advised I was unable to dispute this charge but no reason given. I attempted to refile it today to no avail. I do not know why I am unable to dispute this charge.
